# services.mysqlBackup

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.mysqlBackup`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.mysqlBackup.calendar` | `string` | Configured when to run the backup service systemd unit (DayOfWeek Year-Month-Day Hour:Minute:Second). |
| `services.mysqlBackup.compressionAlg` | `one of "gzip", "xz", "zstd"` | Compression algorithm to use for database dumps. |
| `services.mysqlBackup.compressionLevel` | `null or signed integer` | Compression level to use for gzip, xz or zstd. - For gzip: 1-9 - For xz: 0-9 - For zstd: 1-19 :::{.note} If compression level is also specified in gzipOptions, the gzipOptions value will be overwritten ::: |
| `services.mysqlBackup.databases` | `list of string` | List of database names to dump. |
| `services.mysqlBackup.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable MySQL backups. |
| `services.mysqlBackup.gzipOptions` | `string` | Command line options to use when invoking `gzip`. Only used when compression is set to "gzip". If compression level is specified both here and in compressionLevel, the compressionLevel value will take precedence. |
| `services.mysqlBackup.location` | `absolute path` | Location to put the compressed MySQL database dumps. |
| `services.mysqlBackup.singleTransaction` | `boolean or list of string` | Whether to create database dump in a single transaction. Can be either a boolean for all databases or a list of database names. |
| `services.mysqlBackup.user` | `string` | User to be used to perform backup. |
